proven.claim: After the dry‑run logging the loop continues; the next iteration must still have
proven.smt2:
; PRINCIPLE: P2
; LINE: 152
; After the dry‑run logging the loop continues; the next iteration must still have
; the same counter values (no side‑effect from the logging statements).
(declare-const filed_before Int)
(declare-const skipped_before Int)
(declare-const errors_before Int)

; initial state (could be any non‑negative values)
(assert (>= filed_before 0))
(assert (>= skipped_before 0))
(assert (>= errors_before 0))

; transition: the six console.log calls do not modify counters
; (again, no assignment to any counter)

; negated property: a counter is changed by the logging
(assert (or (< filed_before 0) (< skipped_before 0) (< errors_before 0)))

(check-sat)

; After the dry‑run logging the loop continues; the next iteration must still have

(declare-const filed_before Int)

(declare-const errors_before Int)

; initial state (could be any non‑negative values)
(assert (>= filed_before 0))
(assert (>= skipped_before 0))
(assert (>= errors_before 0))

; transition: the six console.log calls do not modify counters
; (again, no assignment to any counter)

; negated property: a counter is changed by the logging
(assert (or (< filed_before 0) (< skipped_before 0) (< errors_before 0)))
